name: SCC_SetPreparedMsgFaultNotification
title: SCC_SetPreparedMsgFaultNotification
syntax: long SCC_SetPreparedMsgFaultNotification( char FaultCode[], char FaultMessage[] )
description: Sets the fault code and fault message for a prepared message

parameters.name: FaultCode
parameters.description: Desired fault code, which must be a valid enum value according to the specification
